title: Designed for the way you work today
paragraphs: TS is a desk designed for people who value simplicity, functionality, and durability. It is a solution for those who do not need sit/stand functionality but are looking for a stable, solid desk for everyday work with manual height adjustment. Thanks to its restrained form and neutral character, TS works well in offices, educational spaces, shared work environments, and home offices.
The metal frame with a horizontal runner and the MFC tabletop provide durability and comfortable use even under intensive daily operation.
packshotImageAlt: TS desk system product shot – L-shaped oak desktop with black steel frame on white background
